## Summary

Add **Playwright E2E tests** for the dapp register/login flow with mocked wallet signing — catches UI regressions that unit tests miss.

---

## Background

#21 added Server unit tests. The dapp auth UX (connect wallet → sign challenge → redirect dashboard) has no automated coverage. SEP-53 UI bugs reached production before (#11).

---

## Proposed setup

**Directory:** `Front/e2e/`

**Tooling:** Playwright + `@playwright/test`

**Mock strategy:** Inject a test wallet provider that auto-signs SEP-53 messages without Freighter.

**Test cases:**
| Test | Expected |
|------|----------|
| Register flow (mock wallet) | Redirect to `/dashboard`, score visible |
| Login existing user | Dashboard loads profile |
| Invalid wallet format | Error message shown |
| Auth guard on `/dashboard` | Redirect to `/login` without session |

**CI:** New job in `.github/workflows/ci.yml` (optional `continue-on-error` until stable)

---

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Playwright config in `Front/playwright.config.ts`
- [ ] At least 4 E2E specs passing locally
- [ ] Mock wallet signer documented in CONTRIBUTING
- [ ] CI job runs E2E against `next start` + mocked API (or MSW)
- [ ] No real secrets or testnet keys in repo

---

## Related

- #11 auth production issues
- #19 CI pipeline

---

## Out of scope

- Real Freighter extension testing in CI
- Mobile viewport matrix
